artifacts.name: Bastion Ring
artifacts.description: Increases Block by 1. Increases P. DMG Reduction and M. DMG Reduction by 4% for every blocked unit, stacking up to 4 times.
artifacts.max_description: Increases Block by 1. Increases P. DMG Reduction and M. DMG Reduction by 9% for every blocked unit, stacking up to 4 times.
artifacts.story: Long ago, Olague stood alone against an army at his city's gates. He held his ground as his blood dripped through his armor and coated this very ring.

artifacts.name: Wailing Skull
artifacts.description: Dealing DMG has a 40% chance of summoning 1 Shadow Guard with 80% of the hero’s attributes to attack enemies for 10 sec. The effect can be triggered as often as 1 time(s) every 20 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Dealing DMG has a 40% chance of summoning 1 Shadow Guard with 150% of the hero’s attributes to attack enemies for 10 sec. The effect can be triggered as often as 1 time(s) every 20 sec.
artifacts.story: The shriek alone from this vile pendant is enough to make one claw their ears bloody. Wear with caution.

artifacts.name: Tear of Twilight
artifacts.description: ATK is increased by 20% when deployed. When HP is lower than 80%, the ATK increase effect is reduced to 10%.
artifacts.max_description: ATK is increased by 30% when deployed. When HP is lower than 80%, the ATK increase effect is reduced to 15%.
artifacts.story: It is rumored that when sorrow takes the gods of Tya, they cry meteoric tears which plummet to the earth below. Which celestial deity shed this one?

artifacts.name: The Sutra of Caprice
artifacts.description: Increases single-target DMG by 15%. Can rapidly draw cards during the Ultimate.
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases single-target DMG by 30%. Can rapidly draw cards during the Ultimate.</p>
artifacts.story: Beware the cryptic pages of Hex's The Sutra of Caprice. Its distressing future auguries and unspeakable signs of despair will pursue you, even into the hell.

artifacts.name: Frosthorn Staff
artifacts.description: <p>Increases ATK by 8%. When the Ultimate is triggered, dispels all debuffs from all allied heroes within the hero's Basic ATK Range and restores 30% Rage to the hero.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases ATK by 13%. When the Ultimate is triggered, dispels all debuffs from all allied heroes within the hero's Basic ATK Range and restores 30% Rage to the hero.</p>
artifacts.story:
When Gildram's horn fell off, Rivenhald carved it into a staff.
Its surface was covered in a layer of eternal rime, cold as the bare bones of the northern winds. Every time the staff struck the ground, it left tiny cracks in the frozen earth—much like the man himself, silently enduring, silently fracturing. Eirlys once asked him why he never named the staff, but he only gripped it tighter, his knuckles turning white. Some things are too brittle for words.

artifacts.name: Scarlet Dagger
artifacts.description: <p>Increases the AoE DMG by 15%, and gains 15% Penetration during the Ultimate.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases the AoE DMG by 25%, and gains 20% Penetration during the Ultimate.</p>
artifacts.story: Originally crafted for Nyx, this dagger was confiscated by the Blood Mother after Nyx betrayed her vampiric order. Filled with the blood of the innocent, it awaits a worthy master.

artifacts.name: Dragon Bane
artifacts.description: During the effect of Destructive Breath, incrases ATK by 15% and the effect duration by 5 sec.
artifacts.max_description: During the effect of Destructive Breath, incrases ATK by 30% and the effect duration by 5 sec.
artifacts.story: Containing the soul of an elder dragon, this scorching pendant sears the skin of unworthy bearers. Any who harness its might must be forged of fire themselves.

artifacts.name: Cruel Fate
artifacts.description: The duration of Scarlet Ferment becomes permanent, and the chance of gaining it with Basic ATK increases by 30%.
artifacts.max_description: The duration of Scarlet Ferment becomes permanent, and the chance of gaining it with Basic ATK increases by 60%.
artifacts.story: When Volka cursed this jagged stone, she did so with a crimson smile. Cruel Fate grants its user unearthly power while sapping away their very sanity.

artifacts.name: Crown of Souls
artifacts.description: Increases AoE DMG by 20%. Soul Extraction no longer consumes souls.
artifacts.max_description: Increases AoE DMG by 30%. Soul Extraction no longer consumes souls.
artifacts.story: Once an emblem of elven allegiance, the Elven Crown now bears souls — a Crown of Souls birthed from malice. Cloaked in its sinister echo, Vierna treads the path of ceaseless abomination.

artifacts.name: Stormstrike Haladie
artifacts.description: Increases DMG to airborne units by 15%. Hamstring also inflicts 10% Vulnerability (P. DMG) on enemies.
artifacts.max_description: Increases DMG to airborne units by 25%. Hamstring also inflicts 10% Vulnerability (P. DMG) on enemies.
artifacts.story: Upon wielding his haladies, Theowin pledged an oath to Livian, vowing that he would turn into her unyielding storm.

artifacts.name: Divine Justice
artifacts.description: <p>Increases the DMG by 15%. Seal of Retribution and Penetrating Vision can now inflict Mark of Enmity on 1 more target.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases the DMG by 30%. Seal of Retribution and Penetrating Vision can now inflict Mark of Enmity on 1 more target.</p>
artifacts.story: The bearer of Divine Justice must embody justice and fearlessness, acting as the arbiter and guardian of righteousness until their last breath. More than a potent weapon, Divine Justice represents a sacred duty. Throughout history, only one fighter has been deemed worthy of this Artifact - Lady Alexandra.

artifacts.name: Golden Cudgel
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by [20%]. Summoning Sage's Clone additionally restores [6%] Rage.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by [30%]. Summoning Sage's Clone additionally restores [6%] Rage.</p>
artifacts.story: "O' Great Sage, behold an heirloom passed from my ancestors. Forged from the 'Divine Iron of the Celestial River', it is known as the 'Compliant Golden Cudgel'. Weighing 13,500 catties, it's all yours—if you can pick it up!"

artifacts.name: Mask of Dark Desire
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG against targets inflicted with Burning by [20%]. Basic ATK inflicts [15%] DMG Reduction on targets for [3] sec, and Blade of Treachery inflicts [30%] DMG reduction on targets for [3] sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG against targets inflicted with Burning by [30%]. Basic ATK inflicts [15%] DMG Reduction on targets for [3] sec, and Blade of Treachery inflicts [30%] DMG reduction on targets for [3] sec.</p>
artifacts.story: An evil mask that speaks to its wearer, luring them into sowing chaos. It draws power from the buildup of chaotic energy around it, thriving on anything that disrupts order—whether it's bloodlust, mockery, or deception.

artifacts.name: Nightfall
artifacts.description: <p>Increases single target DMG by 20%. Whirlwind Strike and Deep Cleave inflict 20% Vulnerability (P. DMG) and Vulnerability (M. DMG) on enemies for 15 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases single target DMG by 30%. Whirlwind Strike and Deep Cleave inflict 20% Vulnerability (P. DMG) and Vulnerability (M. DMG) on enemies for 15 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: This vessel, once a symbol of Moriden's glory, now imprisons his humanity and regrets.

artifacts.name: Dawnbreak
artifacts.description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 20%. When the Ultimate is activated, immediately casts Leap of Faith and reduces its cooldown by 5 sec during the Ultimate.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 30%. When the Ultimate is activated, immediately casts Leap of Faith and reduces its cooldown by 5 sec during the Ultimate.</p>
artifacts.story: Valara's ancestral spear, its golden lightning dancing like the first rays of dawn.

artifacts.name: Blackbark Pauldrons
artifacts.description: <p>Increases ATK by 10%, and reduces the number of attacks required to trigger Nature's Fury enhanced attack by 2. When in Berserker Stance, Basic ATK restores 2% Max HP, and triggering Ground Stomp restores 10% Max HP.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases ATK by 20%, and reduces the number of attacks required to trigger Nature's Fury enhanced attack by 2. When in Berserker Stance, Basic ATK restores 2% Max HP, and triggering Ground Stomp restores 10% Max HP.</p>
artifacts.story: At the moment Talin awakened the Bear God's power and tore through souls, her oath of guardianship resonated with the wounds of the earth. The ancient spirits of the forest merged with the tears of the Bear God, crystallizing into eternal blossoms upon her shattered pauldrons. From that day onward, flowers would bloom where the guardian bore scars, and the very land would revive with her roars.

artifacts.name: Fire-Tipped Spear
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 20%. Each time attacking with alternating weapons, Increases ATK by 5%, stacking up to 3 time(s), lasting for 10 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 30%. Each time attacking with alternating weapons, Increases ATK by 5%, stacking up to 3 time(s), lasting for 10 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: When Ne Zha was reborn, the Taoist master tempered him with karmic lotus flames for eighty-one cycles. At the spear's completion, its fire pierced through nine heavens. This weapon sings for its master—the more the lotus-bodied warrior fights, the fiercer its sacred flames burn.

artifacts.name: The Dawnbringer
artifacts.description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 20%. Enhanced Basic ATK restores 2% Rage to the hero.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 35%. Enhanced Basic ATK restores 2% Rage to the hero.</p>
artifacts.story: A magic lantern ignited by Lady Mina's soul. Each time the flame flickers, she whispers, becoming gentle shackles that Count Dracula can never escape for all eternity.

artifacts.name: Crest of Dracul
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 20%. During the Ultimate, gains additional ATK equal to 10% of the ATK of absorbed ally heroes with Soul Rot.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 30%. During the Ultimate, gains additional ATK equal to 10% of the ATK of absorbed ally heroes with Soul Rot.</p>
artifacts.story: The rose that blooms from the skull's heart is a contract forged by Lady Mina through eternal suffering. Each time Count Dracula draws upon his power, he must relive the heart-wrenching agony of losing her.

artifacts.name: Leviathan
artifacts.description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 20% and adjacent allies Penetration by 15% (Takes effect only when stronger than the current buff/debuff on the same attribute.)</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 30% and adjacent allies Penetration by 15% (Takes effect only when stronger than the current buff/debuff on the same attribute.)</p>
artifacts.story: Leviathan is a replica of Oren's armor, born in the shadows of a demonic forge. Wrought from living metal, it thirsts for blood yet submits utterly to Kane's will. When Kane dons this armor, he seals a blood pact with it—he shall become the hunter who tames the wolf, awaiting the birth of the false god.

artifacts.name: Green Crescent Blade
artifacts.description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 20%. When Basic ATK and Crescent Slash deal DMG, they inflict 30% DEF Reduction on targets for 3 sec. When Dragon Crescent Slash deals DMG, it inflicts 30% DEF Reduction on targets for 15 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 30%. When Basic ATK and Crescent Slash deal DMG, they inflict 30% DEF Reduction on targets for 3 sec. When Dragon Crescent Slash deals DMG, it inflicts 30% DEF Reduction on targets for 15 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: The Green Dragon awakens in his hand. It has tasted warm wine, carved a path through a world in turmoil, and borne the true weight of loyalty and righteousness. In the end, it fell in the snow alongside the hero, yet in legends of a thousand years, it became a cold, piercing moon that never sets.

artifacts.name: Bone Dirk
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 20%. When dealing DMG to a target with a shield, restores 250 Rage. Trigger Interval: 60 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 35%. When dealing DMG to a target with a shield, restores 250 Rage. Trigger Interval: 60 sec.</p>
artifacts.story:
The dagger grew out of Vorn's wrist bone.
Acid crystallized beneath his skin day after day, piercing through his charred flesh to form a translucent blade. Tattered remnants of The Star Piercers' uniform were wrapped around the hilt, so rotted only a few threads remained. As he gripped it, his entire arm spasmed—this dagger remembered every inch of the pain. The edge forever dripped with acid, burning tiny holes into the ground wherever it fell.

artifacts.name: Keen Wisdom
artifacts.description: When there is any ally within 1 tile(s), increases ATK by 8%.
artifacts.max_description: When there is any ally within 2 tile(s), increases ATK by 16%.
artifacts.story: "United, we stand." - Faded motto found on a worn coat of arms

artifacts.name: Idril's Gaze
artifacts.description: Dealing Crit. Dmg has a 15% chance to ignore 30% of the target’s DEF and M. RES for 3 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Dealing Crit. Dmg has a 25% chance to ignore 40% of the target’s DEF and M. RES for 3 sec.
artifacts.story: "Hold your bow steady. Take a deep breath. Then, release." - Idril

artifacts.name: Nightmare Samsara
artifacts.description: Restores 5% Rage for every 5 attacks.
artifacts.max_description: Restores 7.5% Rage for every 5 attacks.
artifacts.story: Mere contact with this artifact has been said to leave one haunted by recurring nightmares filled with smoke, fire, and screaming.

artifacts.name: The North's Will
artifacts.description: Whenever the hero loses shield, restores 10% HP.
artifacts.max_description: Whenever the hero loses shield, restores 15% HP.
artifacts.story: After the ascension of King Harz to the North Throne, the northern nation is said to have invested a great deal into the construction of a massive and advanced fleet of ships.

artifacts.name: Spirit Siphon
artifacts.description: Increases DMG dealt to the same target by 5% with each consecutive hit, up to 3 times. However, the effect will disappear if the hero switches to a different target.
artifacts.max_description: Increases DMG dealt to the same target by 10% with each consecutive hit, up to 3 times. However, the effect will disappear if the hero switches to a different target.
artifacts.story: Like moths to a flame, the souls of the damned flock to this emerald talisman. When Hatssut took revenge, she used it to siphon the souls from her betrayers.

artifacts.name: Tumultuous Horn
artifacts.description: Increases Initial Rage by 25% when deployed.
artifacts.max_description: Increases Initial Rage by 50% when deployed.
artifacts.story: When enemies besiege your ranks and all appears lost, blow this horn and watch them writhe in madness before attacking one another.

artifacts.name: Sharpshooter Crest
artifacts.description: When there are no enemies within 1 tile, AoE DMG is increased by 20%.
artifacts.max_description: When there are no adjacent enemies, AoE DMG is increased by 30%.
artifacts.story: This magical boon was to be the prize for an archery contest between Idril, Tazira, and Alaura. When Hex learned that he was not invited, he stole it...

artifacts.name: Frigid Flame
artifacts.description: Increases DMG by 6% every 4 sec when no DMG is taken. Stacks up to 3 times. Taking DMG each time removes 1 stack.
artifacts.max_description: Increases DMG by 11% every 4 sec when no DMG is taken. Stacks up to 3 times. Taking DMG each time removes 1 stack.
artifacts.story: This spear was found in the carcass of an ice dragon, its unnamed wielder lying dead beside it. Coated with the beast's frigid blood, its magical properties are beyond comprehension.

artifacts.name: Graveyard Opus
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 15%. During the Ultimate, inflicts Anti-Healing on affected enemies.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 25%. During the Ultimate, inflicts Anti-Healing on affected enemies.</p>
artifacts.story: Withered with time, the pages of Zelus' research notes have fallen into decay. What secrets of the dead lie within?

artifacts.name: Euphoric Orb
artifacts.description: Increases the ATK Spd. Of all heroes in range by 30 every 60 sec, lasting for 10 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Increases the ATK Spd. Of all heroes in range by 30 every 60 sec, lasting for 40 sec.
artifacts.story: The physical form of ecstasy itself. This orb was used by Dolores for many years as a part of her act, enchanting all who gazed into its depths.

artifacts.name: Seabed Crown
artifacts.description: Each Basic ATK launched has a(n) 25% chance to release 1 extra energy ball(s).
artifacts.max_description: Each Basic ATK launched has a(n) 50% chance to release 1 extra energy ball(s).
artifacts.story: Shamir and his sea dragon salvaged this crown from an abandoned kingdom beneath the waves. They've safeguarded it for decades, awaiting one who might unite the oceans.

artifacts.name: Lunacy Visor
artifacts.description: Increases Block by 1. Additionally, the wearer restores HP equal to 0.7% of Max HP each time they deal DMG to 1 target, stacking up to 3 targets.
artifacts.max_description: Increases Block by 1. Additionally, the wearer restores HP equal to 1.2% of Max HP each time they deal DMG to 1 target, stacking up to 3 targets.
artifacts.story: Whoever dons this crimson mask trades sanity for nightmarish strength. Like an infernal parasite, it attaches itself to the face of the user, creating a symbiotic bond of blood.

artifacts.name: Realm Tear
artifacts.description: Deals increased DMG to enemies beyond 1 tile from the hero. For every 1 tile beyond the first, DMG is increased by 3%.
artifacts.max_description: Deals increased DMG to enemies beyond 1 tile from the hero. For every 1 tile beyond the first, DMG is increased by 8%.
artifacts.story: When the Chaos Dominion sliced a hole between realms, it was Alistair who sealed the void with the relic sitting before you.

artifacts.name: Oblivion Pendant
artifacts.description: Increases the Ultimate duration by 5 sec and the Self-Repair duration by 5 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Increases the Ultimate duration by 7.5 sec and the Self-Repair duration by 5 sec.
artifacts.story: Were this pendant to fall into the wrong hands, it would spell the demise of every soul in Tya. As such, it lies guarded by Setram, a sentinel intent on keeping the apocalypse at bay.

artifacts.name: Eagle's Heartbeat
artifacts.description: Increases the chance of gaining Winged Blessings by 30% when Stormbeak disappears.
artifacts.max_description: Increases the chance of gaining Winged Blessings by 80% when Stormbeak disappears.
artifacts.story: The reverberations from Kaede's sacred drum can be felt in one's chest from miles away, sending spirits to flight while cleansing troubled souls.

artifacts.name: Euphonic Coronet
artifacts.description: When the Ultimate is triggered, there is a 50% chance to grant one of the following buffs to all allies within the skill range: ATK Spd. increases by 60; Rage Regen increases by 30%; Crit. DMG increases by 30%. The applied buff lasts until the end of the Ultimate.
artifacts.max_description: When the Ultimate is triggered, there is a 100% chance to grant one of the following buffs to all allies within the skill range: ATK Spd. increases by 60; Rage Regen increases by 30%; Crit. DMG increases by 30%. The applied buff lasts until the end of the Ultimate.
artifacts.story: Blessed with light by Camille herself, this sacred healing crown radiates with jubilation.

artifacts.name: Eye of Mockery
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG dealt to targets inflicted with Burning by 20%. During Hellfire, ignore 10% of DEF when attacking enemies with Burning.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG dealt to targets inflicted with Burning by 30%. During Hellfire, ignore 10% of DEF when attacking enemies with Burning.</p>
artifacts.story: Zaltir's soul is forever trapped here, despising his poor brother with a gaze filled with hatred.

artifacts.name: Golden Scarab
artifacts.description: ATK increases by 5%. Rage Regen increases by 25%.
artifacts.max_description: ATK increases by 5%. Rage Regen increases by 50%.
artifacts.story: In the faith of the Nether God, scarabs serve as pathfinders, carving routes leading to the expansive Netherworld realms. The departed follow these paths back to the Nether God's comforting arms, making scarabs the worthy custodians and ushers of these routes.

artifacts.name: Astral Obelisk
artifacts.description: ATK increases by 5%. After receiving healing, increases Rage Regeneration by 25% for 5 sec.
artifacts.max_description: ATK increases by 5%. After receiving healing, increases Rage Regeneration by 50% for 5 sec.
artifacts.story: The ancient divine melodies emanating from between the stars are a soul-corroding and venomous poison to the children of Tya. Therefore, the Arbiters erected this obelisk, aligning their wills with it to create a barrier that isolates the divine melodies.

artifacts.name: Weaver's Hood
artifacts.description: Increases the hero's Healing Effect by 10. After Enlightened Breath is triggered, there is a(n) 50% chance to reset its Cooldown.
artifacts.max_description: Increases the hero's Healing Effect by 20. After Enlightened Breath is triggered, there is a(n) 50% chance to reset its Cooldown.
artifacts.story: The searing agony of the Emerald Flame was unbearable even for someone as resilient as Ezryn. Unable to find respite from the scorching pain, Ezryn received the blessings of the Mistress of Dreams, a hood that granted him much-needed relief in dreams from the relentless torment.

artifacts.name: Eye of Penitence
artifacts.description: Increases DMG dealt by 5%. Bloodpact now triggers periodically instead of triggering upon enemies' death in range.
artifacts.max_description: Increases DMG dealt by 15%. Bloodpact now triggers periodically instead of triggering upon enemies' death in range.
artifacts.story:
A pathetic coward, consumed by fear and resignation.
An inept ruler known for his chronic indecisiveness and inertia.

artifacts.name: Tidebreaker
artifacts.description: Upon casting the Ultimate, increases DMG taken by 40% and DMG dealt by 25% for 15 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Upon casting the Ultimate, increases DMG taken by 30% and DMG dealt by 40% for 15 sec.
artifacts.story: When Razaak wields the mysterious hunting pike, he gains boundless strength. However, this incredible strength amplifies Razaak's deep-seated hatred for those who harm the seas, driving him to the edge of madness.

artifacts.name: Arachno Shroud
artifacts.description: Basic ATK restores 1% Rage. The Ultimate duration becomes infinite starting from the 3rd activation.
artifacts.max_description: Basic ATK restores 1.5% Rage. The Ultimate duration becomes infinite starting from the 3rd activation.
artifacts.story: Aracha's power truly unfolds in her Arachno Shroud, affirming her perpetual dominion over the shadows.

artifacts.name: Bloodblade
artifacts.description: Deals 20% more DMG to targets inflicted with Bleed. Every time the Ultimate deals DMG to targets inflicted with Bleed, the hero restores 1.5% Rage.
artifacts.max_description: Deals 30% more DMG to targets inflicted with Bleed. Every time the Ultimate deals DMG to targets inflicted with Bleed, the hero restores 1.5% Rage.
artifacts.story: Once a bloodthirsty blade, it was purified by Salazar with his own Dragon Blood. Since then, it cannot accept inferior mortal blood.

artifacts.name: Captivation of Burning Desire
artifacts.description: Increases Crit. DMG by 30%. When triggering Sinful Lash, it will be triggered 2 consecutive times.
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases Crit. DMG by 45%. When triggering Sinful Lash, it will be triggered 2 consecutive times.</p>
artifacts.story: Poppy's ashes dance excitedly within the burning desire, as men and women gradually succumb to moans and gasps, bound by the whip of lust.

artifacts.name: Orb of Ruin
artifacts.description: Increases ATK by 10%. Upon triggering the Talent, there is a(n) 40% chance to generate a Mutated Blossom I or II instead. Mutated Blossom I Additional Effect: Deals 50% DMG per sec to enemies on affected tiles. Mutated Blossom II Additional Effect: Reduces the Effect Duration to 5 sec. When the Effect Duration ends, explodes and deals 300% AoE DMG.
artifacts.max_description: Increases ATK by 20%. Upon triggering the Talent, there is a(n) 40% chance to generate a Mutated Blossom I or II instead. Mutated Blossom I Additional Effect: Deals 50% DMG per sec to enemies on affected tiles. Mutated Blossom II Additional Effect: Reduces the Effect Duration to 5 sec. When the Effect Duration ends, explodes and deals 300% AoE DMG.
artifacts.story: This mysterious orb emanates a dark violet radiance, incessantly infusing deadly magic into surrounding life, especially plants.

artifacts.name: Key of the Forsaken
artifacts.description: Increases Max HP by 5% every 10 sec on the field, stacking up to 3 time(s). Upon reaching max stacks, increases DMG by 8%.
artifacts.max_description: Increases Max HP by 7% every 10 sec on the field, stacking up to 3 time(s). Upon reaching max stacks, increases DMG by 12%.
artifacts.story: A key, sporting a mysterious green eye, silently observes its wearer. The owner of the key experiences a surprising improvement in health and strength. However, an unsettling feeling permeates, suggesting something is yearning to break free.

artifacts.name: Lucent Flame
artifacts.description: <p>Increases single-target DMG by 20%. Extends the effect duration of Demonslaying Stance by 2 sec. When Shadow Slash is activated, enters Demonslaying Stance immediately. </p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases single-target DMG by 30%. Extends the effect duration of Demonslaying Stance by 2 sec. When Shadow Slash is activated, enters Demonslaying Stance immediately. </p>
artifacts.story: Forged from the wrath of Demon Hunters' souls, this blade kindles white flames that incinerate all malevolence. When wielded by a Demon Hunter, white flames enshroud its sharp edge, searing every demon with a purifying flame.

artifacts.name: Demonic Relic
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 15%. Inflicts 1 mark to targets hit by Sweeping Strike or Ember Strike for 15 sec. Increases the hero's DMG dealt to enemies with the mark by 20%.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 25%. Inflicts 1 mark to targets hit by Sweeping Strike or Ember Strike for 15 sec. Increases the hero's DMG dealt to enemies with the mark by 20%.</p>
artifacts.story: Passed down through the Kigiri family, this is said to be the head of a powerful demon—the Amanojaku—slain by their ancestors. It contains immense power, but also carries a maddening curse.

artifacts.name: Helm of Yalnor
artifacts.description: <p>AoE DMG +[20%]. The number of knockback targets from Talent increases by [2].</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>AoE DMG +[30%]. The number of knockback targets from Talent increases by [2].</p>
artifacts.story: On a battlefield strewn with corpses, Calista stumbled forward, leaning on Sir Aldric's spear. She made her way toward a pile of bodies glowing with golden light, retrieved Aldric's remains from within, and inherited his glory.

artifacts.name: Phoenix Feather Fan
artifacts.description: <p>Increases ATK by 5%. When Serenade of Hope reaches maximum stacks, gains an extra 10% Healing bonus; when Song of Sorrow reaches maximum stacks, increases ATK by an extra 3%.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases ATK by 5%. When Serenade of Hope reaches maximum stacks, gains an extra 35% Healing bonus; when Song of Sorrow reaches maximum stacks, increases ATK by an extra 3%.</p>
artifacts.story: When war consumes the mortal realm and cries of agony ascend, the artifact will awaken to its destiny. With a simple gesture, it brings peace to all lands. However, with another, it can reignite war.

artifacts.name: Halberd of Woe
artifacts.description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 15%. Expands Chaos Strike's range. When Chaos Strike kills an enemy, reduces the Trigger Interval of the next Chaos Strike by 4 sec. This effect has a 30 sec Cooldown.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 30%. Expands Chaos Strike's range. When Chaos Strike kills an enemy, reduces the Trigger Interval of the next Chaos Strike by 4 sec. This effect has a 30 sec Cooldown.</p>
artifacts.story: Wild and unbound, he strode through Chang'an's streets, his might unmatched and spirit free. Though kindred souls were rare in this vast world, he spent half his life living with fiery boldness.

artifacts.name: Carrion's Call
artifacts.description: <p>Increases ATK by 20%. Beelzebub guarantees a Crit. Hit on enemies damaged by Putrid Flies within 5 sec and deals 30% increased DMG.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases ATK by 30%. Beelzebub guarantees a Crit. Hit on enemies damaged by Putrid Flies within 5 sec and deals 30% increased DMG.</p>
artifacts.story: An evil artifact known as "Carrion's Call" that controls the swarms. The swarms summoned by this artifact no longer hunger for mere carrion and rotting flesh.

artifacts.name: Shattered Hilt
artifacts.description: <p>Increases single-target DMG by 10%. For every 5 instance(s) of DMG dealt, increases single-target DMG by an extra 1% stacking up to 10 time(s).</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases single-target DMG by 20%. For every 5 instance(s) of DMG dealt, increases single-target DMG by an extra 1% stacking up to 10 time(s).</p>
artifacts.story: Magic flows through the rust-covered blade, its inscribed runes long shattered. Yet in the hands of every fighter, its perfection remains unquestioned.

artifacts.name: Blightcaller's Claw
artifacts.description: <p>Increases single-target DMG by 14%. After Basic ATK, has a(n) 15% chance to trigger a special strike that deals 80% P.DMG to 1 target. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 4 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases single-target DMG by 20%. After Basic ATK, has a(n) 15% chance to trigger a special strike that deals 100% P.DMG to 1 target. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 4 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: In Yalnor's folklore, a legendary figure known as the Blightcaller emerged, targeting and eliminating tyrannical nobles. Yet, this avenger has since vanished from sight.

artifacts.name: Chaotic Doomblade
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by [15%]. When HP drops below [30%], the DMG Increase is doubled. With [1] stack of Chaotic Vitality, also inflicts [10%] Vulnerability (P. DMG) to nearby enemies.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by [25%]. When HP drops below [30%], the DMG Increase is doubled. With [1] stack of Chaotic Vitality, also inflicts [10%] Vulnerability (P. DMG) to nearby enemies.</p>
artifacts.story:
Fallen sun burns fierce and bright,
Heavens shatter with their might.
A king's sword strikes in vain,
Sacred light dims in the rain.
Souls trapped in steel so cold,
Bloody tears stain runes of old.
Evil shadows lurk in blade,
Dawn's light shall forever fade.

artifacts.name: Sentinel's Eye
artifacts.description: <p>Increases single-target DMG by [15%]. When the Ultimate is activated, each flying sword grants [1%] Penetration for [5} sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases single-target DMG by [30%]. When the Ultimate is activated, each flying sword grants [1%] Penetration for [5} sec.</p>
artifacts.story: The Sentinel's Eye slowly melds its wearer into the forest, turning them into an eternal guardian. Defy the forest's will, and the Sentinel's Eye shall revoke its blessing, plunging the wearer into endless nightmares.

artifacts.name: Dwarven Strider
artifacts.description: <p>Increases all attributes of the hero by 5%. </p><p>After casting the Ultimate, gains an extra 1% increase to all attributes. This increase can stack up to 3 time(s).</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases all attributes of the hero by 8%. </p><p>After casting the Ultimate, gains an extra 1% increase to all attributes. This increase can stack up to 5 time(s).</p>
artifacts.story: Seven oaths were forged into brass joints, each slaughter shattering a seal, until the corrupted soul made its bearer a living sacrifice to the tyrant of the abyss.

artifacts.name: Helm of Helios
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 15%. After casting the Ultimate, allies within 2 tiles gain an extra 10% DMG increase for 10 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 25%. After casting the Ultimate, allies within 2 tiles gain an extra 10% DMG increase for 10 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: The golden helm blooms with the solar emblem, and after twelve sunrises, the eyes of the God of the Sun glow with the hue of his helm at dusk.

artifacts.name: Eternal Winter
artifacts.description: <p>Increases ATK by 20%. During the Ultimate, casting Frozen Purification has a 25% chance to cast 2 consecutive times.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases ATK by 30%. During the Ultimate, casting Frozen Purification has a 25% chance to cast 2 consecutive times.</p>
artifacts.story: As Boreas spent centuries carving his glacial palace, his absolute focus and relentless pursuit of perfection coalesced into an ancient Heart of Frozen Echoes at its core. He forged this heart into a staff—its icy shaft encasing an undying flame of curiosity, allowing his Frozen Purification to resonate and multiply in an instant.

artifacts.name: Triple-Bladed Glaive
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 20%. Hound Assault is enhanced. When Howling Celestial Dog attacks enemies, enhances the owner's DMG. This effect can stack up to 6 time(s). Each stack also grants Erlang Shen 3% P. DMG Reduction and M. DMG Reduction for 10 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 30%. Hound Assault is enhanced. When Howling Celestial Dog attacks enemies, enhances the owner's DMG. This effect can stack up to 6 time(s). Each stack also grants Erlang Shen 3% P. DMG Reduction and M. DMG Reduction for 10 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: Jade Spring Mountain, deep within the frigid pool, a three-headed serpent had coiled for millennia. Erlang Shen pierced its illusions with his Heavenly Eye, severed its heads, and drew its sinews— the beast's very bones reforged into a blade.

artifacts.name: Vlad's Impaler
artifacts.description: <p>Increases Max HP by 20%. When entering combat, Block +1. After a counterattack is triggered, applies War Frenzy to the caster for 2 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases Max HP by 25%. When entering combat, Block +1. After a counterattack is triggered, applies War Frenzy to the caster for 2 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: This once-sacred relic has been passed down through generations of the Vlad family, and now the spear thirsts for demonic blood. It witnessed the fall of Vlad II and now awaits Vlad Draculea to complete this destined Blood Sacrifice.

artifacts.name: Consecrated Edge
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 15%. During the Ultimate, reloads 4 Mythril Bolt(s) when launching the giant axe's attack.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 25%. During the Ultimate, reloads 4 Mythril Bolt(s) when launching the giant axe's attack.</p>
artifacts.story: Forged from holy silver and tempered with Dr. Van Helsing's blood. With this sacred relic, Dr. Van Helsing severed the heads of vampires, bringing their vile existence to a definitive end.

artifacts.name: Frost Devourer
artifacts.description: <p>Increases Max HP by 10%, and increases DMG by 10%. Enhanced ATK can also be triggered when the caster has no shield.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases Max HP by 15%, and increases DMG by 15%. Enhanced ATK can also be triggered when the caster has no shield.</p>
artifacts.story: Frost Devourer was the sword of Aedrin, laid to rest with him in the northern realms. When he was remade by the Nether God, the blade too was steeped in his bone-chilling cold and undying resolve, transforming into the demonic sword Frost Devourer. It now whispers of betrayal and vengeance, awaiting the day Aedrin will wield it southward to seal the empire in ice.

artifacts.name: Hand of Doom
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 15%. Upon killing 3 enemies, increases the hero's Penetration by 10%.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 25%. Upon killing 3 enemies, increases the hero's Penetration by 10%</p>
artifacts.story: The crystal on this glove turns crimson with every murder. It promises the wielder the strength to break all rules, but with each use, their mind drifts closer to Dagon's domain, until they view reality itself as a fragile thing to be torn apart at will.

artifacts.name: Hate's Contagion
artifacts.description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 15%. When dealing DMG to 3 or more enemies simultaneously, permanently increases AoE DMG by an extra 1%, stacking up to 10 time(s).</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 20%. When dealing DMG to 3 or more enemies simultaneously, permanently increases AoE DMG by an extra 1%, stacking up to 10 time(s).</p>
artifacts.story: Infused with plague and shadow energy. Its "curse" incites the deepest desire for destruction within the wielder, spreading their resentment for a single enemy to all surrounding living beings. The more enemies harmed, the faster it spreads, and the stronger the user's thrill of destruction becomes, potentially reducing them to a monster that knows only how to vent fury.

artifacts.name: Resonance Bell
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 15%. If there are adjacent allies, further increases DMG by 10%.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 25%. If there are adjacent allies, further increases DMG by 10%.</p>
artifacts.story: Crafted by a music master obsessed with the art of the battlefield, this small bell does not ring by shaking, but generates a faint hum from surrounding footsteps, breathing, and even heartbeats. When multiple sounds act in concert within a specific rhythm, the bell's chime reaches harmony, releasing a magical resonance.

artifacts.name: Painter's Palette
artifacts.description: <p>Increases ATK by 20%. Prismarch gains 50% P. DMG reduction and M. DMG Reduction.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases ATK by 30%. Prismarch gains 50% P. DMG reduction and M. DMG Reduction.</p>
artifacts.story: The burl's texture is a rubric of flesh; it was not painted, but bred by blood and bone. Every inch was steeped in the darkness before awakening, until the maiden's sigh tears through the silent linen for the first time.

artifacts.name: Paintress's Brush
artifacts.description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 20%. Painted tiles inflict 50% Slow on enemies. (Takes effect only when stronger than the current buff/debuff on the same attribute.)</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 30%. Painted tiles inflict 50% Slow on enemies. (Takes effect only when stronger than the current buff/debuff on the same attribute.)</p>
artifacts.story: In the beginning, there was only awareness: an indigo stirred with sighs and longing, a violet still void of form. Later, it took shape—when she first yearned to "touch" Pierre, the color coalesced into a brush. From then on, everything she perceived was returned to the canvas, reflected in a form more real than life itself.

artifacts.name: Mech Core
artifacts.description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 20%. After the hero deals DMG to the target inflicted with Winter's Bite or Freeze, increases ATK by 8% for 10 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases AoE DMG by 30%. After the hero deals DMG to the target inflicted with Winter's Bite or Freeze, increases ATK by 8% for 10 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: What the Dwarves left unfinished will be completed by their creations.

artifacts.name: Codex of Silence
artifacts.description: <p>Increases ATK by 20%. Extends Dream Eater's effect duration by 3 sec and increases its Movement Spd.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases ATK by 30%. Extends Dream Eater's effect duration by 3 sec and increases its Movement Spd.</p>
artifacts.story:
The title page was blank.

But Beatrix remembered the location of every name. She knew which soul was curled up in the bottom right corner of the left page, and which one was broken at the seam. The pages grew thicker and thicker; turning them felt like moving a tombstone. She occasionally wondered if the book would speak once every slot was filled. Until then, it merely fed in silence.

artifacts.name: Blade of Talkiel
artifacts.description: Increases the duration of the Burning effect inflicted by the hero by 3 sec. Deals 20% more DMG to targets inflicted with Burning.
artifacts.max_description: Increases the duration of the Burning effect inflicted by the hero by 3 sec. Deals 30% more DMG to targets inflicted with Burning.

artifacts.name: Heart of the Mouintain
artifacts.description: <p>Increases Max HP by 15%. When the caster has a shield Increases Block +1 and restores 5% Max HP to the caster per sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases Max HP by 25%. When the caster has a shield Increases Block +1 and restores 5% Max HP to the caster per sec.</p>

artifacts.name: Pathbreaker
artifacts.description: <p>Increases single target DMG by 20% and increases the DMG Multiplier of Soulblade by an extra 100%.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases single target DMG by 30% and increases the DMG Multiplier of Soulblade by an extra 100%.</p>

artifacts.name: Moonfrost
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 20%. When dealing Direct DMG, has a 20% chance to inflict 1 stack of Radiant Erosion for 10 sec on the target.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 30%. When dealing Direct DMG, has a 20% chance to inflict 1 stack of Radiant Erosion for 10 sec on the target.</p>

artifacts.name: Jade Dragon
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 20%. After casting Fist of Qi, increases DMG by an extra 10% for 5 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 30%. After casting Fist of Qi, increases DMG by an extra 10% for 5 sec.</p>

artifacts.name: Rex's Vow
artifacts.description: Reduces damage taken by 10% when protected by a shield.
artifacts.max_description: Reduces damage taken by 20% when protected by a shield.
artifacts.story: "My sword will banish demons like shadows receding from the sun." - Rex

artifacts.name: White Tower Trinket
artifacts.description: When deployed, increases ATK by 12%. When there are no adjacent allies, gains an extra ATK Spd. Increase of 20.
artifacts.max_description: When deployed, increases ATK by 18%. When there are no adjacent allies, gains an extra ATK Spd. Increase of 35.
artifacts.story: The White Tower's mages speak highly of its glorious mission, but refrain from commenting on their organization's frightening secrets.

artifacts.name: Broken Nightmare
artifacts.description: Each Basic ATK launched increases ATK by 3% for 2 sec, stacking up to 3 time(s).
artifacts.max_description: Each Basic ATK launched increases ATK by 8% for 2 sec, stacking up to 3 time(s).
artifacts.story: Even before he was exiled by his people, the great dwarven blacksmith Azhor created weapons that radiated with unnatural malice.

artifacts.name: The Watchguard's Ambition
artifacts.description: Each Basic ATK launched has a(n) 10% chance of triggering another Basic ATK.
artifacts.max_description: Each Basic ATK launched has a(n) 15% chance of triggering another Basic ATK.
artifacts.story: The founding members of The Watchguard desired to serve a purpose beyond themselves. Nomadic wanderers, they used this pendant to guide them to Akkadia.

artifacts.name: The Watchguard's Unity
artifacts.description: Max HP +10%
artifacts.max_description: Max HP +20%
artifacts.story: The Watchguard were not always a unified force. Disagreements over purpose and tactics escalated into full blown internal battles. This ancient seal put an end to bloodshed within the faction, uniting them once and for all.

artifacts.name: Scarlet Hunt
artifacts.description: Deals 20% extra DMG to targets inflicted with Bleed.
artifacts.max_description: Deals 30% extra DMG to targets inflicted with Bleed.
artifacts.story: Adorned with teeth extracted from Salazar's greatest pursuits, only the strongest of hunters are worthy of its might.

artifacts.name: Brightroot Ring
artifacts.description: When HP is at maximum, increases Healing Effect by 30.
artifacts.max_description: When HP is at maximum, increases Healing Effect by 40.
artifacts.story: The very lifeforce of the forest, crystalized in your hand. Enchanted by Elowyn, this ring speaks for the defiant trees of Tya, channeling their might.

artifacts.name: Flux Pendant
artifacts.description: Increases Crit. DMG by 12%. When HP drops below 50%, the increase is doubled.
artifacts.max_description: Increases Crit. DMG by 30%. When HP drops below 50%, the increase is doubled.
artifacts.story: This pendant lacks symmetry and order, lending itself to chaos instead. A testament to the maniac who enchanted it, Hex.

artifacts.name: Tya's Balm
artifacts.description: Increases Healing Multiplier by 30% when healing a hero with less than 30% HP.
artifacts.max_description: Increases Healing Multiplier by 50% when healing a hero with less than 40% HP.
artifacts.story: A sublime crystal pulled from a mountain and inlaid with metals enchanted by Arbiter healers. Emits a warm, silvery glow and soothes pain.

artifacts.name: Eye of Sin
artifacts.description: Increases AoE DMG by 10%. Killing enemies grants an extra 5% AoE DMG bonus that lasts 3 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Increases AoE DMG by 20%. Killing enemies grants an extra 10% AoE DMG bonus that lasts 3 sec.
artifacts.story: A ring inlaid with an eye belonging to an infamous succubus. Anyone who peers into its depths will view themselves in a hellscape unique to their wretched sins.

artifacts.name: Lionheart Pommel
artifacts.description: During the Ultimate, increases the hero's max HP by an extra 20% and Max HP of allies within the Ultimate Range by 10%.
artifacts.max_description: During the Ultimate, increases the hero's max HP by an extra 40% and Max HP of allies within the Ultimate Range by 15%.
artifacts.story: Modeled after the valiant Regulus, affix this pommel to any melee weapon and dazzle your enemies with its radiance or crush their skulls...

artifacts.name: Brimstone's Fury
artifacts.description: <p>During the Ultimate, increases AoE DMG by 20% and Initial Rage by 450.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>During the Ultimate, increases AoE DMG by 20% and Initial Rage by 700.</p>
artifacts.story: "I only see red." - Torodor, the Undying Bull

artifacts.name: Tuning Crystal
artifacts.description: After every 10 Basic ATK landed, deals AoE P. DMG 1 time equal to 200% of DMG Multiplier to at most 5 targets and restores HP for 10% of DMG dealt.
artifacts.max_description: After every 10 Basic ATK landed, deals AoE P. DMG 1 time equal to 250% of DMG Multiplier to at most 5 targets and restores HP for 20% of DMG dealt.
artifacts.story: Precious stones such as these appear on Laya's magical healing harp. She pried this one free and donated it to the Watchguard.

artifacts.name: Elysian Epitaph
artifacts.description: Increases Healing Effect (ST) by 3% for every 1 ally unit(s) present in range, stacking up to 4 time(s).
artifacts.max_description: Increases Healing Effect (ST) by 8% for every 1 ally unit(s) present in range, stacking up to 4 time(s).
artifacts.story: When an entire coastal city succumbed to a merciless plague, this tome of healing appeared inexplicably upon its seaside cliffs. Was it sent by the gods? And if not, what savior delivered it without reward?

artifacts.name: Bloodbond Signet
artifacts.description: Reduces Max HP by 30% and increases Crit. DMG by 20%.
artifacts.max_description: Reduces Max HP by 15% and increases Crit. DMG by 45%.
artifacts.story: A magic ring with deadly allure. Its former owner, gripped by fear, claimed before their death that a demon dwelled within the ring.

artifacts.name: Reaper's Emblem
artifacts.description: Increases DMG by 5%. After killing the target, increases an additional DMG of 5%, stacking up to 2 times. This effect lasts for 10 seconds.
artifacts.max_description: Increases DMG by 10%. After killing the target, increases an additional DMG of 10%, stacking up to 2 times. This effect lasts for 10 seconds.
artifacts.story: A farmer reached into an odd portal. When he withdrew his hand, this ring was clinging to what remained of his skeletal limb. He could only watch in horror as the ring drained his life away.

artifacts.name: Mindflayer Quartz
artifacts.description: The Trigger Chance of Dark Sacrifice increases by an extra 10%. When it's triggered, the hero restores 35 Rage.
artifacts.max_description: The Trigger Chance of Dark Sacrifice increases by an extra 10%. When it's triggered, the hero restores 60 Rage.
artifacts.story: Pulsing beneath deep in a burial ground it created, this chthonic crystal calls for one to pry it from the earth and dominate the masses. The time has come.

artifacts.name: The Devil's Gaze
artifacts.description: <p>Basic ATK restores 1.2% Rage. During the effect of Meteoric Strike, 3 extra wave(s) of Meteor Shower will be summoned, which only deals single-target DMG.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Basic ATK restores 1.7% Rage. During the effect of Meteoric Strike, 3 extra wave(s) of Meteor Shower will be summoned, which only deals single-target DMG.</p>
artifacts.story: "Yes, my pets. Peer into the iris... and surrender your souls." - Abyzou

artifacts.name: Sanguine Shroud
artifacts.description: <p>Reduces the required stacks of marks to trigger Throbbing Wound by 1. When Swish is triggered, deals 20% extra DMG for 15 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Reduces the required stacks of marks to trigger Throbbing Wound by 1. When Swish is triggered, deals 30% extra DMG for 15 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: Aspire to drift among shadows as effortlessly as Selene? Don the Sanguine Shroud, and gorge yourself on the blood of the wicked.

artifacts.name: Sorrow's Veil
artifacts.description: During the Ultimate, increases DMG by 10% and Deals 15% extra DMG to targets with shields.
artifacts.max_description: During the Ultimate, increases DMG by 20% and Deals 30% extra DMG to targets with shields.
artifacts.story: Forged in Ain's likeness to conceal his marred countenance, this mask thrums with arcane energy.

artifacts.name: Anchor of the Damned
artifacts.description: During the effect of Boiling Brine, increases DMG by 15%, and defeating a target increases ATK by 1%, stacking up to 10 times.
artifacts.max_description: During the effect of Boiling Brine, increases DMG by 20%, and defeating a target increases ATK by 1%, stacking up to 10 times.
artifacts.story: When Captain Reve seized his anchor, he knew it was beyond redemption. From that fateful moment, he's doomed to feast on souls and tread the path of wickedness.

artifacts.name: Whispering Grace
artifacts.description: When the Ultimate is activated and when it ends, triggers 1 healing at a rate of 150% of the healing multiplier. After the Ultimate ends, reduces the HP loss effect on allies by 20%
artifacts.max_description: When the Ultimate is activated and when it ends, triggers 1 healing at a rate of 200% of the healing multiplier. After the Ultimate ends, reduces the HP loss effect on allies by 20%
artifacts.story: Amidst the ethereal melodies and the Holylight, within the realm of a bitter and icy dream, Sadie extends her hands deep into the shimmering luminescence.

artifacts.name: Sorrow Bloom
artifacts.description: Increases the hero's ATK by 10%. After the Cursed Pact takes effect, Basic ATK strikes 1 extra target.
artifacts.max_description: Increases the hero's ATK by 20%. After the Cursed Pact takes effect, Basic ATK strikes 1 extra target.
artifacts.story: A desolate bloom sways on the devastated Nordshire soils, marking the aftermath of a massacre.

artifacts.name: Unending Relic
artifacts.description: Increases DMG by 0.2% every time HP drops by 1%. When Water of Decay deals DMG, there is a(n) 30% chance of inflicting Poison on targets, lasting for 10 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Increases DMG by 0.45% every time HP drops by 1%. When Water of Decay deals DMG, there is a(n) 30% chance of inflicting Poison on targets, lasting for 10 sec.
artifacts.story: Each memorial of a painful demise is as eternal as the unending battle of Cerberus.

artifacts.name: Flaming Pauldrons
artifacts.description: Increases DMG dealt to Elites and Bosses by 15%, reduces the Effect Duration of Ultimate by 10 sec, and increases DMG dealt during the Ultimate by an extra 30%. If the AoE ATK of Heavy Blow hits only 1 target, this ATK ignores 20% of the enemy's DEF.
artifacts.max_description: Increases DMG dealt to Elites and Bosses by 25%, reduces the Effect Duration of Ultimate by 10 sec, and increases DMG dealt during the Ultimate by an extra 30%. If the AoE ATK of Heavy Blow hits only 1 target, this ATK ignores 20% of the enemy's DEF.
artifacts.story: Flames of fury flicker and surge, incinerating mediocre souls with an unstoppable force. Looking upon the destructing fury, Wrath can't help but smile as he collects the resulting ashes.

artifacts.name: Shield of Valor
artifacts.description: Increases Max HP by 10%. During the Elven Blessing, deals 100% AoE DMG to up to 5 target(s) and restores 10% HP every 10 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Increases Max HP by 20%. During the Elven Blessing, deals 100% AoE DMG to up to 5 target(s) and restores 10% HP every 10 sec.
artifacts.story: Forever etched in Livian's memory is the day she tore her elegant gown, armored herself heavily, and tattooed the pain of losing her beloved onto her heart.

artifacts.name: Tome of Holylight
artifacts.description: Increases ATK by 5%. During the Ultimate, heals allies in range (excluding the hero) for 8% Base Healing every sec.
artifacts.max_description: Increases ATK by 5%. During the Ultimate, heals allies in range (excluding the hero) for 13% Base Healing every sec.
artifacts.story: Entwined in legend, the Tome of Holylight is said to be born from the Holylight itself. Housing the secrets to transcendence, it has ignited numerous conflicts, spreading chaos far and wide. Sensing the disorder it wrought, the Tome mysteriously disappeared from existence.

artifacts.name: Scepter of Impiety
artifacts.description: Increases ATK by 10%. After Anora casts her Ultimate, Labor's AoE DMG permanently increases by 5%, stacking up to 3 time(s). When Labor kills an enemy, restores 3% Rage for Anora. This effect can trigger only 1 time every 5 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Increases ATK by 20%. After Anora casts her Ultimate, Labor's AoE DMG permanently increases by 5%, stacking up to 3 time(s). When Labor kills an enemy, restores 3% Rage for Anora. This effect can trigger only 1 time every 5 sec.
artifacts.story: The scepter resonates with the agonized cries of the sacred spirit trapped within, a haunting melody of despair echoing throughout day and night. Anora's reasons for subjecting this celestial being to such torment remain a mystery to all.

artifacts.name: Raven's Crest
artifacts.description: Increases single-target DMG by 15%. When the Ultimate activates, restores 12% Rage.
artifacts.max_description: Increases single-target DMG by 25%. When the Ultimate activates, restores 12% Rage.
artifacts.story: Helga's crown, adorned with thorns, pierces deep into her scalp and skin. The unceasing agony that fractures her being is nothing less than a curse, a manifestation of seething hatred.

artifacts.name: Talisman of Resolve
artifacts.description: When shielded, increases DMG by 20%. This effect lasts for 6 sec after the shield vanishes.
artifacts.max_description: When shielded, increases DMG by 35%. This effect lasts for 6 sec after the shield vanishes.
artifacts.story: An intricately designed mechanical amulet, bearing a striking resemblance to a turtle, demonstrates exceptional craftsmanship. Its maker once quipped, "Do not cower behind shield spells like a reclusive turtle, charge toward the front!"

artifacts.name: Silent Fury
artifacts.description: <p>When deployed, increases Block by 1, and increases counterattack DMG by 100% during the Ultimate. After triggering a counterattack, increases DEF by 3%, stacking up to 5 time(s).</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>When deployed, increases Block by 1, and increases counterattack DMG  by 100% during the Ultimate. After triggering a counterattack, increases DEF by 3%, stacking up to 10 time(s).</p>
artifacts.story: Crafted in ancient style, this emerald necklace glows with a serene green radiance, silently embodying both its wrath and ambition.

artifacts.name: Deadwater Diadem
artifacts.description: <p>Talent Enhanced: There is a(n) 50% chance of gaining 1 extra stack of Qi after triggering Dodge. Upon gaining Qi, increases single-target DMG by 15% for 8 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Talent Enhanced: There is a(n) 50% chance of gaining 1 extra stack of Qi after triggering Dodge. Upon gaining Qi, increases single-target DMG by 25% for 8 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: Wearers of this crown inherit vast spiritual power, inner tranquility, and clear-mindedness, enabling them to make optimal decisions in the direst moments. This crown symbolizes not only honor and dignity, but also the pursuit of spiritual consummation.

artifacts.name: Falcon's Crest
artifacts.description: <p>Increases Anti-Air DMG by [15%]. Scattered Shots can bounce [1] additional time on hit, dealing [40%] DMG.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases Anti-Air DMG by [25%]. Scattered Shots can bounce [1] additional time on hit, dealing [40%] DMG.</p>
artifacts.story: This sacred artifact embodies the sun's brilliance and the moon's mystical glow. Its bearer is blessed with the safeguarding embrace of light, capable of melding with light in all its forms.

artifacts.name: Dragonblood Goblet
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DEF by 10% and DMG by 10%. When taking DMG, both DEF Increase and DMG Increase are doubled for 8 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DEF by 12% and DMG by 12%. When taking DMG, both DEF Increase and DMG Increase are doubled for 10 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: Through a special ritual, those who drink the blood of ancient dragons lost to history shall gain the dragon's ferocity.

artifacts.name: Cadaver Dagger
artifacts.description: <p>Increases Max HP by [5%] and DMG by [6%]. When taking DMG, both Max HP and DMG Increase are doubled for [8] sec</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases Max HP by [5%] and DMG by [10%]. When taking DMG, both Max HP and DMG Increase are doubled for [10] sec</p>
artifacts.story: The Cadaver Dagger, forged by artisans of the Netherworld, is no mere weapon, but a test of will. To unlock its true power, each wielder must plunge it into their own heart. Those who survive shall gain immortality and unrivaled might.

artifacts.name: Spirit of the Pack
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 10%. After moving, gains an extra 5% DMG increase for 10 sec.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 20%. After moving, gains an extra 5% DMG increase for 10 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: The Spirit of the Pack howls softly, quickening the stride of the armored warriors as their blades surge with morale, until the blood moon fades to ashen gray.

artifacts.name: Shawl of the Lifegiver
artifacts.description: <p>Increases Max HP by 10%. After casting the Ultimate, applies an extra healing to 3 ally unit(s) with the lowest HP percentage within 1 tile, restoring HP equal to 15% of their Max HP.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases Max HP by 25%. After casting the Ultimate, applies an extra healing to 3 ally unit(s) with the lowest HP percentage within 1 tile, restoring HP equal to 15% of their Max HP.</p>
artifacts.story: As feathers whirl in a surge, the warhorse's final neigh resonates. Each blood-stained plume brings healing, yet only the shawl's bearer knows these are the unspoken goodbyes, the last bravery of the fallen.

artifacts.name: Uzimo Relic
artifacts.description: <p>Increases single-target DMG by 15%. Needle of Torment prioritizes attacking the enemy with the lowest HP.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases single-target DMG by 30%. Needle of Torment prioritizes attacking the enemy with the lowest HP.</p>
artifacts.story: On the night Uzimo burned, Yuri offered her voice as a sacrifice, weeping before the fox spirit for the power to reduce her foes to ashes. Moved by her tears, the spirit plucked a thread of her scorched soul and wove it with consuming flames into a hairpin. This flame freezes bones and corrodes hearts, yet for Kigiri alone, she plays a silent requiem—may he hear a forgotten lullaby the instant his blade falls.

artifacts.name: Song of the Butterfly
artifacts.description: <p>Increases healing effect by 25, Butterflies fly faster and when Enchanted Ritual is activated, sends 1 additional butterfly to allies, which disappears after the Ultimate ends.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases healing effect by 40, Butterflies fly faster and when Enchanted Ritual is activated, sends 1 additional butterfly to allies, which disappears after the Ultimate ends.</p>
artifacts.story:
Where the wing-wind passes—
Silver ferns bloom on scorched earth, the dying glimpse dawn's veil.
Hark! The ancient woodland melody remains unfinished,
as newborn veins sprout beneath her staff.

artifacts.name: Slayer's Malice
artifacts.description: When HP is above 80%, increases DMG by 10%.
artifacts.max_description: When HP is above 80%, increases DMG by 20%.
artifacts.story: Pure loathing radiates from this artifact.

artifacts.name: Lucky Legacy
artifacts.description: For each time the cost is restored, there is a 5% chance to double the amount.
artifacts.max_description: For each time the cost is restored, there is a 15% chance to double the amount.
artifacts.story: It seems that the last owner of this artifact's luck fell short.

artifacts.name: Spellcaster's Echo
artifacts.description: Recovers 10% Rage after using a skill.
artifacts.max_description: Recovers 15% Rage after using a skill.
artifacts.story: The words of an ancient spell reverberate in your skull.

artifacts.name: Shadow Gaze
artifacts.description: <p>Increases ATK by 10% for every 5 attacks, lasting for 5 sec. Stacks up to 2 times.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases ATK by 20% for every 5 attacks, lasting for 5 sec. Stacks up to 2 times.</p>
artifacts.story: The coils of darkness swirling around this necklace attract wayward souls.

artifacts.name: Nightmare Serpent
artifacts.description: Taking DMG 5 time(s) restores HP equal to 3% Max HP. This effect can take effect only 1 time every 4 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Taking DMG 3 time(s) restores HP equal to 6% Max HP. This effect can take effect only 1 time every 4 sec.
artifacts.story: According to some legends, the infamous blacksmith Azhor allied with demons to learn forbidden, infernal techniques.

artifacts.name: The North's Glory
artifacts.description: Healing a unit to full HP has a 20% chance of granting them a shield equal to 20% of its Max HP for 10 sec. The effect can only be triggered 1 time every 5 seconds.
artifacts.max_description: Healing a unit to full HP has a 40% chance of granting them a shield equal to 30% of its Max HP for 10 sec. The effect can only be triggered 1 time every 5 seconds.
artifacts.story: The crown gem of the northern realm. Atop Fort Blacklast sits a crystal made from the frozen flames of dragon fire. This piece was chipped off at King Harz's order and repurposed to serve the North Throne.

artifacts.name: Heaven's Rage
artifacts.description: A Crit. Hit increases Crit. DMG by 25% for 3 sec.
artifacts.max_description: A Crit. Hit increases Crit. DMG by 45% for 3 sec.
artifacts.story: To this day, none alive knows how Ajax managed to tame the black dragon upon which he commands the skies. This ring was unearthed in the ashes of their battleground.

artifacts.name: Ichor Chalice
artifacts.description: Increases DMG by 10%. When dealing DMG, restores 3% of the hero’s Max HP.
artifacts.max_description: Increases DMG by 15%. When dealing DMG, restores 5% of the hero’s Max HP.
artifacts.story: The Blood Mother used this crimson vessel during the unholy blooding of the former prince, Daemon. It is always brimming with blood.

artifacts.name: Unfortunate Skull
artifacts.description: DMG received is increased by 20% while AoE DMG is increased by 25%.
artifacts.max_description: DMG received is increased by 10% while AoE DMG is increased by 35%.
artifacts.story: Ever chewed through demon gristle? Well, this is all that remains of one coming between Gluttony and a meal.

artifacts.name: Goddess' Grace
artifacts.description: Increases DEF by 10%. Gains an extra 3% DEF bonus for every 10 sec on the battlefield. Stacks up to 3 time(s).
artifacts.max_description: Increases DEF by 15%. Gains an extra 5% DEF bonus for every 10 sec on the battlefield. Stacks up to 3 time(s).
artifacts.story: An amulet crafted in the image of a beautiful deity lost to time. When worn, the warmth of a protective embrace radiates from within.

artifacts.name: Tome of Horror
artifacts.description: Attacking slowed targets increases ATK Spd. by 30 and Rage Regen by 25% for 5 sec. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 8 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Attacking slowed targets increases ATK Spd. by 30 and Rage Regen by 50% for 5 sec. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 8 sec.
artifacts.story: This accursed volume once resided in Azzoth's smoldering library before being filched by a daring rogue. He managed to stow these foul pages before being flayed alive.

artifacts.name: Serpent's Kiss
artifacts.description: During the Ultimate, for each ATK dealt, increases Crit DMG by 10%, stacking up to 3 times. This effect expires after the Ultimate Ends.
artifacts.max_description: <p>During the Ultimate, for each ATK dealt, increases Crit DMG by 35%, stacking up to 4 times. This effect expires after the Ultimate Ends.</p>
artifacts.story: The fangs on this foul skull are coated in the blood of Venoma's slithering children. Unleash it upon your enemies and watch them writhe in the mire.

artifacts.name: Dreamglow Repository
artifacts.description: When Basic ATK grants Magic Incense, there is a(n) 50% chance to grant the target a shield equal to 10% of the target's Max HP, lasting 6 sec.
artifacts.max_description: When Basic ATK grants Magic Incense, there is a(n) 50% chance to grant the target a shield equal to 15% of the target's Max HP, lasting 6 sec.
artifacts.story: Behold the vessel before you, used by Dassomi to capture the nightmares of his patients and transcend their forms into a healing elixir.

artifacts.name: Soul Crucible
artifacts.description: <p>During the Ultimate, increases Block by 1. When in the Heated State, the chance to inflict Stun increases by 10 %. Each ATK restores the hero's HP equal to 3% of Max HP.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>During the Ultimate, increases Block by 1. When in the Heated State, the chance to inflict Stun increases by 10 %. Each ATK restores the hero's HP equal to 8% of Max HP.</p>
artifacts.story: A sinister artifact crafted by Azhor with his own steaming blood. When filled with a corrupt soul, it melts it down into a magma used for forging cursed arms.

artifacts.name: Molten Cog
artifacts.description: Cannon Overload has a 50% chance to fire 3 extra Cannonballs.
artifacts.max_description: Cannon Overload has a 80% chance to fire 3 extra Cannonballs.
artifacts.story: "Fer the last time, Crach—If ye drop this we'll blow straight through the mountain!" - Brunor

artifacts.name: Stoic Winter
artifacts.description: When deployed, increases Block by 1. When inflicted with Freeze, the hero restores 10% HP and increases DEF by 10%.
artifacts.max_description: When deployed, increases Block by 1. When inflicted with Freeze, the hero restores 20% HP and increases DEF by 20%.
artifacts.story: Adorned with runes both inside and out, this enigmatic mask was crafted by Brokkir in his frigid Northern forge, and allows its owner to face the tundra head on.

artifacts.name: Aureate Visage
artifacts.description: Increases DMG by 20% when the hero is invisible. Gains Invisibility for 3 sec when the Ultimate is activated.
artifacts.max_description: Increases DMG by 30% when the hero is invisible. Gains Invisibility for 6 sec when the Ultimate is activated.
artifacts.story: With empty and seemingly lifeless eyes, a raging fire burns within. Concealed within the shadows, there is a presence that brings utter annihilation to all who dare to meet the gaze.

artifacts.name: Oneiric Band
artifacts.description: When the Ultimate is triggered, increases ATK by 8% and ATK Spd. by 40 for 10 sec.
artifacts.max_description: When the Ultimate is triggered, increases ATK by 10% and ATK Spd. by 60 for 15 sec.
artifacts.story: This artifact, brought from the dreamland by a fortunate adventurer, remained untouched for many ages. One bright morning, Dolores, in high spirits, uncovered the divine luminescence radiating from the artifact.

artifacts.name: Chant of the Depths
artifacts.description: For every 12 instance(s) of DMG dealt by Seal Stone, it deals an extra 140% DMG.
artifacts.max_description: For every 12 instance(s) of DMG dealt by Seal Stone, it deals an extra 240% DMG.
artifacts.story: The deceitful, despicable lullabies from the darkest depth echo incessantly in Calypso's ear.

artifacts.name: Glacial Wings
artifacts.description: When the Ultimate is not activated, gains a 3-sec shield equal to 4% of Max HP with each Basic ATK, stacking up to 7 times.
artifacts.max_description: When the Ultimate is not activated, gains a 3-sec shield equal to 6% of Max HP with each Basic ATK, stacking up to 10 times.
artifacts.story: The laws of the gods constantly punish Valkyra's transgressions, and her divinity has been forever at odds with her humanity within her demigod body. Thus, King Harz, driven by his deep love for his daughter, divided the sword that symbolized his royal authority into two and reforged it into a new sword and this pair of wings to protect his beloved daughter.

artifacts.name: Tome of Greed
artifacts.description: Increases ATK by 10%. When deployed, immediately gains 3 stack(s) of Soul Reaping. Each kill has a(n) 50% chance of granting 2 stack(s) of Soul Reaping.
artifacts.max_description: Increases ATK by 15%. When deployed, immediately gains 3 stack(s) of Soul Reaping. Each kill has a(n) 50% chance of granting 2 stack(s) of Soul Reaping.
artifacts.story: Nobody can outrun greed, not even death.

artifacts.name: Medal of Fortitude
artifacts.description: When attacked, gains a 10-sec shield with Shield Strength equal to 10% of the hero's Max HP. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 65 sec.
artifacts.max_description: <p>When attacked, gains a 10-sec shield with Shield Strength equal to 10% of the hero's Max HP. This effect can only be triggered 1 time every 40 sec.</p>
artifacts.story: A lesser artifact that has been anointed in holy water and blessed by priests.

artifacts.name: Taunting Gaze
artifacts.description: Increased distance means increased DMG. (Every 1 tile away from the target increases DMG dealt by 2%).
artifacts.max_description: Increased distance means increased DMG. (Every 1 tile away from the target increases DMG dealt by 4.5%).
artifacts.story: "My arrows always find their mark." - An archer's fateful boast

artifacts.name: Nyniv's Mercy
artifacts.description: When entering the field, increases Healing Effect by 10.
artifacts.max_description: When entering the field, increases Healing Effect by 15.
artifacts.story: The blessing of Nyniv shimmers in the shadows.

artifacts.name: Voroth's Wrath
artifacts.description: Increases Crit. Rate by 0.3% for every 1% reduction in HP.
artifacts.max_description: Increases Crit. Rate by 0.8% for every 1% reduction in HP.
artifacts.story: "Blood for blood. My enemies will know no peace." - Voroth

artifacts.name: Radiant Lantern
artifacts.description: Increases AoE Healing Effect by 3 for every 1 allied unit(s) in range, stacking up to 4 time(s).
artifacts.max_description: Increases AoE Healing Effect by 8 for every 1 allied unit(s) in range, stacking up to 4 time(s).
artifacts.story: The light of this lantern is believed to reveal secrets and uncover deeply hidden truths.

artifacts.name: Nightmare Shadow
artifacts.description: Increases Crit. Rate by 5% for every 5 attack(s). Can stack up to 3.
artifacts.max_description: Increases Crit. Rate by 10% for every 5 attack(s). Can stack up to 3.
artifacts.story: Some of Tya's most cursed and deadly artifacts were forged by Azhor, The Hellforge Betrayer, himself.

artifacts.name: The Watchguard's Disguise
artifacts.description: Increases DMG to airborne units by 10%.
artifacts.max_description: Increases DMG to airborne units by 15%.
artifacts.story: This ring is worn by members of The Watchguard, and allows them to recognize one another in hostile lands.

artifacts.name: The Watchguard's Wisdom
artifacts.description: Increases the chance of triggering an additional Basic ATK by 0.2% for every 1% increase in Rage. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time every 5 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Increases the chance of triggering an additional Basic ATK by 0.5% for every 1% increase in Rage. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time every 5 sec.
artifacts.story: "Within the dimensions of this crystal lies all the collected knowledge of our sacred order. Keep it safe." - Camille

artifacts.name: Regal Crest
artifacts.description: Received Healing +20%.
artifacts.max_description: Received Healing +40%.
artifacts.story: "Let this sigil signify safety, order, and justice to all in need. The North watches over Tya." - King Harz

artifacts.name: Tidal Ring
artifacts.description: Increases DMG by 10%. Dealing DMG has a 25% chance of slowing down the target by 50% for 2 sec. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time every 4 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Increases DMG by 15%. Dealing DMG has a 50% chance of slowing down the target by 50% for 2 sec. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time every 4 sec.
artifacts.story: Crafted from the same ancient pearl that revealed Marri's history, this ring channels the vigor of Tya's oceans, calling upon its might when needed.

artifacts.name: Amulet of Arteries
artifacts.description: For every 10 instance(s) of M. ATK inflicted, Selene’s Shadow Strike is summoned upon up to 3 enemies, dealing 80% DMG. The effect can be triggered as often as 1 time every 8 sec.
artifacts.max_description: For every 10 instance(s) of M. ATK inflicted, Selene’s Shadow Strike is summoned upon up to 3 enemies, dealing 130% DMG. The effect can be triggered as often as 1 time every 8 sec.
artifacts.story: Crafted from the congealed blood of seven greater vampires. Their images are faintly reflected within its facets.

artifacts.name: Bloodlust Phylactery
artifacts.description: Increases DMG permanently by 1% when damage is taken. Stacks up to 15 time(s).
artifacts.max_description: Increases DMG permanently by 1% when damage is taken. Stacks up to 25 time(s).
artifacts.story: A sanguine, ominous aura envolopes this strange device. Donations of blood are exchanged for unholy power.

artifacts.name: Luck of Tya
artifacts.description: In EXP Raid, killing an enemy grants a(n) 80% chance to gain 1 random buff: ATK +25% or DMG +25% for 10 sec, (20% chance to gain both). This effect can be triggered once every 10 sec.
artifacts.max_description: In EXP Raid, killing an enemy grants a(n) 80% chance to gain 1 random buff: ATK +30% or DMG +30% for 10 sec, (20% chance to gain both). This effect can be triggered once every 10 sec.
artifacts.story: When Cutter was struck by an arrow, this sturdy pendant broke the arrowhead, saving his life. Of course, he then lost it in a dice game.

artifacts.name: Eonian Time
artifacts.description: Dealing AoE DMG increases the hero’s AoE DMG by 2%. This effect can stack up to 5 time(s) and last for 3 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Dealing AoE DMG increases the hero’s AoE DMG by 2%. This effect can stack up to 10 time(s) and last for 3 sec.
artifacts.story: Strangely enough, the sands of this hourglass never cease trickling. He who wields it controls time itself.

artifacts.name: Pin of Precision
artifacts.description: If the hero hasn’t received any DMG within the last 6 sec, their DMG will be increased by 10%.
artifacts.max_description: If the hero hasn’t received any DMG within the last 6 sec, their DMG will be increased by 20%.
artifacts.story: "Impressive. You caught my arrow with your throat..." - Calypso

artifacts.name: Crescent Totem
artifacts.description: 60 seconds after deployment, gains permanent invisibility and increases ATK Spd. by 50.
artifacts.max_description: 35 seconds after deployment, gains permanent invisibility and increases ATK Spd. by 60.
artifacts.story: When Aylin wove this pendant from moonbeams, she swore to only bestow it upon one worthy of its reverence. Are you worthy?

artifacts.name: Wailing Tusk
artifacts.description: Extends the duration of Glory Recalled by an additional 10 sec. While Glory Recalled is active, increases DMG by 15%
artifacts.max_description: Extends the duration of Glory Recalled by an additional 15 sec. While Glory Recalled is active, increases DMG by 25%
artifacts.story: The horns from a demon's skull similar to this one now adorn Apsan's shoulders, granting him unearthly strength.

artifacts.name: Volcanic Heart
artifacts.description: Increases each instance of Lava Flow's DMG by 5% of the hero's Max HP.
artifacts.max_description: Increases each instance of Lava Flow's DMG by 15% of the hero's Max HP.
artifacts.story: Pulsing with hellfire fury, this molten relic was drawn from the core of the same infernal crucible in which Magmus was forged.

artifacts.name: Crest of Thunder
artifacts.description: Increases AoE DMG by 10%
artifacts.max_description: Increases AoE DMG by 20%
artifacts.story: An ancient talisman imbued with the power of storms, granting unparalleled protection. However, it is said that the storm's power within the talisman was not bestowed by the gods but shamelessly stolen from them.

artifacts.name: Soulbane Rosary
artifacts.description: Reduces Max HP by 20%, increases ATK by 8%, and increases ATK Spd. By 30.
artifacts.max_description: Reduces Max HP by 5%, increases ATK by 10%, and increases ATK Spd. By 50.
artifacts.story: Nordshire was a purgatory for innumerable trapped souls, struggling to find liberation from their misery. The selfless Compassionate Lightbringer, through his spiritual prowess, managed to calm some of these tormented spirits. However, this noble act cost him his life, leaving behind his potent rosary as a bitter reminder of his sacrifice.

artifacts.name: Pharaoh's Pschent
artifacts.description: During the Ultimate, increases AoE DMG by 25%.
artifacts.max_description: During the Ultimate, increases AoE DMG by 40%.
artifacts.story: In life, thy bodies were slaves to the Pharaoh, and in death, thy souls shall become vessels for the Pharaoh's might. Naught can alter thy fate, even the false gods of the Netherworld.

artifacts.name: Grasp of Sands
