artifacts.description: When attacking targets inflicted with 3 stack(s) of Sand Erosion, restores 1.5% Rage and increases DMG by 20% for 3.5 sec.
artifacts.max_description: When attacking targets inflicted with 3 stack(s) of Sand Erosion, restores 1.5% Rage and increases DMG by 30% for 3.5 sec.
artifacts.story: Amid a terrifying sandstorm, delicate grains coalesce in Laseer's palm.

artifacts.name: Aurate Pledge
artifacts.description: <p>Increases DMG by 20% when the caster's HP is above 80%.</p>
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG by 30% when the caster's HP is above 80%.</p>

artifacts.name: Death Knell
artifacts.description: When the hero is deployed, increases DEF by 5%. When the hero’s HP drops to 40% or below, instantly restores 15% HP. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time(s) max per deployment.
artifacts.max_description: When the hero is deployed, increases DEF by 15%. When the hero’s HP drops to 40% or below, instantly restores 30% HP. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time(s) max per deployment.
artifacts.story: It's said that if you listen very carefully to this artifact, you can hear death's inevitable approach.

artifacts.name: Rage Chain
artifacts.description: Increases Crit. DMG by 0.3% for every 1% reduction in HP.
artifacts.max_description: Increases Crit. DMG by 0.6% for every 1% reduction in HP.
artifacts.story: This elegant necklace is rumored to have brought death to every single one of its owners.

artifacts.name: Heart of Thorn
artifacts.description: When taking DMG, there is a 8% chance of dealing DMG equal to 10% Max HP to the attacker.
artifacts.max_description: When taking DMG, there is a 13% chance of dealing DMG equal to 20% Max HP to the attacker.
artifacts.story: According to the paperwork that accompanied it, this amulet once belonged to the legendary Knight of Thorns.

artifacts.name: Sacred Amber
artifacts.description: Increases Healing Effect by 20. Additionally, for each ally in range, reduces Healing Effect by 5.
artifacts.max_description: Increases Healing Effect by 40. Additionally, for each ally in range, reduces Healing Effect by 10.
artifacts.story: This blue-toned amber is believed to have been produced by a sacred tree guarded by the fae.

artifacts.name: Soul Binding Crystal
artifacts.description: Restores 3% Rage when killing the target. Cooldown: 5 sec.
artifacts.max_description: Restores 5% Rage when killing the target. Cooldown: 5 sec.
artifacts.story: This unusual crystal is one of the many products produced by White Tower researchers... and promptly hidden away for unknown reasons.

artifacts.name: The North's Horn
artifacts.description: When shielded, increases Crit. Rate by 10%. When the shield disappears, the Crit. Rate bonus will last for 6 more sec.
artifacts.max_description: When shielded, increases Crit. Rate by 15%. When the shield disappears, the Crit. Rate bonus will last for 6 more sec.
artifacts.story: This intricate horn appears to have been carved from a fresh chunk of ice. Its sound is capable of traveling across vast expanses of snow without losing volume.

artifacts.name: The North's Judgement
artifacts.description: When shielded, increases ATK by 10%. When the shield disappears, the bonus will last for 6 more sec.
artifacts.max_description: When shielded, increases ATK by 15%. When the shield disappears, the bonus will last for 6 more sec.
artifacts.story: Though the North is known for its fearsome warriors, its imposing judges are not to be trifled with. The high conviction rate in the wintry nation makes it a dangerous place to be apprehended.

artifacts.name: The North's Storm
artifacts.description: When shielded, increases ATK by 10%.
artifacts.max_description: When shielded, increases ATK by 15%.
artifacts.story: This relic was harvested from the very heart of a raging blizzard. Within its shimmering depths lies all the beauty and fury of the northlands.

artifacts.name: Solar Embrace
artifacts.description: When taking DMG, DEF is increased by 12% for 3 sec.
artifacts.max_description: When taking DMG, DEF is increased by 22% for 3 sec.
artifacts.story: Channel the sun's rays to bolster your defense and render enemies blind. Blessed by Meriel, the Holylight Paladin.

artifacts.name: Winter's Call
artifacts.description: During the Ultimate, each ATK deals extra DMG equal to 1 time(s) the current ATK Spd.
artifacts.max_description: During the Ultimate, each ATK deals extra DMG equal to 2.5 time(s) the current ATK Spd.
artifacts.story: Once carried by Voroth across the barren tundra, this horn freezes the courage of those he stalks in the snow. Use it wisely.

artifacts.name: Prey Slayer
artifacts.description: Deals 10% extra DMG to target inflicted with Bleed.
artifacts.max_description: Deals 20% extra DMG to target inflicted with Bleed.
artifacts.story: In the depths of shadows, the hunter prowls, the pursuit forever unending if blood is still coursing through their target's veins.

artifacts.name: Chalice of Youth
artifacts.description: Increases Healing Multiplier by 18% when healing a hero with less than 30% HP.
artifacts.max_description: Increases Healing Multiplier by 30% when healing a hero with less than 40% HP.
artifacts.story: "Following one's heart keeps one young." — Unknown

artifacts.name: Nephrite Folio
artifacts.description: When HP is at maximum, increases Healing Effect by 15.
artifacts.max_description: When HP is at maximum, increases Healing Effect by 20.
artifacts.story: A replica of an ancient stone tablet, these mysterious pages emanate a soothing green glow, carrying the power to calm the soul. The meaning of the inscriptions upon them remains a secret known to none.

artifacts.name: Warsong
artifacts.description: Increases DMG dealt by 5%. Eliminating an enemy grants an extra DMG Increase of 5%, lasting for 5 seconds.
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases DMG dealt by 10%. Eliminating an enemy grants an extra DMG Increase of 5%, lasting for 5 seconds.</p>
artifacts.story: This lesser artifact was refined using a mysterious technique.

artifacts.name: Adamant Will
artifacts.description: Increases Healing Effect by 5. When HP is at maximum, additionally increases Healing Effect by 5.
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases Healing Effect by 10. When HP is at maximum, additionally increases Healing Effect by 5.</p>
artifacts.story: "Family, fortitude, fame!" - The echoing chant of an approaching army

artifacts.name: Consuming Rage
artifacts.description: Increases Crit. Rate by 5% upon entering combat. When a Crit. Hit lands, increases Crit. Rate by an extra 5%.
artifacts.max_description: <p>Increases Crit. Rate by 10% upon entering combat. When a Crit. Hit lands, increases Crit. Rate by an extra 5%.</p>
artifacts.story: "Valor begets victory!" - A conqueror's booming cry

artifacts.name: The Watchguard's Fortune
artifacts.description: Each Basic ATK launched has a chance equal to 10% of Crit. Rate to trigger 1 additional heal.
artifacts.max_description: Each Basic ATK launched has a chance equal to 20% of Crit. Rate to trigger 1 additional heal.
artifacts.story: Legends say this artifact is filled with the tears of the golems that once protected The Watchguard. This chalice never empties, providing vitality and protection to any who drink from it.
